title: Dto Graph File Ref
description:
Client-side type for **Dto Graph File Ref**, kept in parity with the matching `api:dto-*` spec so
remote and embedded Studio render the same JSON the API emits.
context:
Client-side type for **Dto Graph File Ref**, kept in parity with the matching `api:dto-*` spec so
remote and embedded Studio render the same JSON the API emits.

rules.requirement: client DTO matches API wire shape
rules:
Field names, optional/required semantics, and nesting MUST match the paired `api:dto-*` spec. The
client MUST NOT invent alternate property names.

rules.requirement: types are shared or generated from API schemas
rules:
DTO types MUST be imported from a shared package or generated from the same schema source used by
API presenters and OpenAPI.

constraints: @specd/ui and @specd/client MUST NOT import @specd/core or @specd/sdk for kernel bootstrap.
HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.requirement: client DTO matches API wire shape
scenarios.name: Client type fields match API DTO
when: TypeScript compiles client against paired api:dto-*

scenarios.requirement: client DTO matches API wire shape
scenarios.name: Client reads resolved path fields directly
given: API JSON with workspaceRelativePath and projectRelativePath
when: the client deserializes a graph file ref
then: adapters and UI read those fields directly
AND no local workspace:path splitting helper is required

scenarios.requirement: types are shared or generated from API schemas
scenarios.name: Types imported from shared package
